description: Mirrors fulltext-search-flynn-probate-empty but matches the `name` field. Returns zero results when the skill uses the Name parameter for witness/heir searches (per SKILL.md Step 4) on Patrick Flynn in Schuylkill probate.

keywords.description: Full-text search query with Lucene operators. Use + to require a term, - to exclude, "..." for phrase, * for wildcard (min 3 chars). Default is OR — always use + for required terms.

name.description: Search within name fields only. Same operator syntax as keywords.

place.description: Search within place fields. Note: place matches collection metadata and can cause false positives. Prefer post-filtering.

nlQuery.description: Natural language search query or a FamilySearch tree person ID.

collectionId.description: Filter to a specific FamilySearch collection by ID.

imageGroupNumber.description: Filter to a specific digitized volume by Image Group Number.

yearFrom.description: Start of year range filter. Must be paired with yearTo.

yearTo.description: End of year range filter. Must be paired with yearFrom.

recordPlace1.description: Filter by country (or state within US/Mexico/Canada/UK).

count.description: Number of results to return. Default 5, max 100.

includeFacets.description: When true, include facet counts in the response. Default false.
